description_long: This is a distorted representation of an adult pedestrian, with elongated limbs and a stretched torso, suggesting a dynamic pose as if in mid-stride or possibly running. The figure appears to be wearing long pants and a long-sleeved top, with the clothing clinging closely to the body. The head is small and slightly tilted, with one arm raised and bent at the elbow, possibly holding an object or gesturing. The legs are unnaturally extended, with one foot forward and the other trailing behind, giving a sense of motion. The surface of the figure is smooth and reflective, with visible highlights and a glossy finish. The overall form is abstracted, with some anatomical features exaggerated or missing, but the general silhouette of a walking adult is discernible.
description: A highly distorted adult pedestrian figure in a dynamic walking or running pose, with elongated limbs and glossy, smooth clothing. The form is abstract but retains the recognizable outline of a person in motion.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from an upper angle, highlighting the raised arm and elongated legs, with the head and torso visible.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the stretched lower limbs and the bent posture, with the arm and hand partially obscured.
description_view_2: From this angle, the back and trailing leg are prominent, and the head is visible with the arm raised overhead.
description_view_3: A rear-side view showing the extended leg and the back of the torso, with the other leg and arm partially visible.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeved top and long pants in a fitted, casual style
attribute_posture: dynamic stride with one arm raised and body leaning forward
